_publications._publicationTitle: Activation of Sonic hedgehog signaling in neural progenitor cells promotes glioma development in the zebrafish optic pathway.

_contextSnippet: We identified a krt5 promoter sequence that targeted oncogenic Smoa1 expression to putative neural progenitor cells in the zebrafish CNS
details: Targeted oncogenic Smoa1 expression to putative neural progenitor cells in the zebrafish CNS
